summary: Alley Boss negotiates the formation of a major alliance with various guilds to tackle the main scenario, despite his lingering suspicions about their true intentions. During these negotiations, he is approached by Liu Shei, who arranges a meeting between him and the director of Edidas, Lude. Eventually, the protagonist joins the massive assault on the rebels' stronghold, kicking off the battle with a barrage of magic and explosions while attempting to hide his private communications with Sunny from his streaming audience.
key_moments: Alley Boss facilitates the formation of an alliance with New World, Phoenix, and other guilds.
Liu Shei approaches Alley Boss to arrange a meeting with the Edidas director, Lude.
Alley Boss joins the massive raid on the rebel stronghold alongside other NPCs and guilds.
